title: Tragacantha pycnostachya
intro: Tragacantha pycnostachya, also known as Astragalus pycnostachyus, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the legume family, Fabaceae. The plant is valued for its adaptogenic and immunomodulatory properties, and its health benefits include enhanced immune function, reduced inflammation, and improved endurance. The bioactive constituents of Tragacantha pycnostachya include flavonoids, saponins, and polysaccharides, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with this plant include teas, capsules, and extracts, often used to support immune function and alleviate the symptoms of fatigue and stress.
